gt_provenance.details: Real captured per-head K (pre repeat_kv); recovery graded vs jd_floor with attacker-favorable Hungarian. WARN: only jd_floor_t1 stored; RESULTS says 'at the floor across T' without jd_floor_t4.

score_normalization.details: No self-normalization; bits via /ln2; M-only gram_error=0.124 feature-subsample caveat disclosed.

result_existence.details: 273 records; all RESULTS numbers trace to analysis.json/sanity.json; no phantom numbers.

dead_code_probe_not_attack.details: All metric fns called; negentropy = whitened-row skew/kurtosis only (no joint-diag); not circular.

scope.details: RESULTS scope correctly bounded; EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md stale (describes abandoned kqv_out/dev24/b={2,4,8} design).

faithfulness.details: eq.9 order + orthogonal S/M + per-block one-time-pad P̂ correct; stored-K surface appropriate (kqv_out left invariant by design). WARN: A built over flattened full width, not strictly per-head; narrows additive-mask ablation faithfulness, does not affect M/S·P̂ conclusions.
